description_long: This mosque features a grand central structure with a large, ribbed dome at its core, surrounded by several smaller domed pavilions and open colonnades. The main building is flanked by two tall, slender minarets with pointed conical roofs and decorative balconies. The exterior is finished in a pale, marble-like material with subtle streaks of pink and blue, giving it a serene and elegant appearance. The mosque includes arched windows and open galleries, providing a sense of openness and light. The architectural design is characterized by verticality, with the minarets and central dome rising prominently above the base. There are no visible Islamic geometric patterns or Arabic calligraphy, and the style suggests a blend of Ottoman and fantasy influences.
description: A grand mosque with a large central dome, tall slender minarets, and open colonnades, finished in pale marble-like tones with blue-green domes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central dome, and two tall minarets with pointed roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered domes, arched galleries, and the vertical prominence of the minarets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central dome, the minarets, and the symmetry of the structure.
description_view_3: Angled view revealing the open colonnades, smaller domes, and the architectural layering of the mosque.
attribute_dome: One large central dome with a ribbed surface, pale blue-green in color, placed atop the main prayer hall; several smaller domes on surrounding pavilions.
attribute_minaret: Two tall, slender minarets with pointed conical roofs, rising significantly above the main dome, positioned symmetrically at the front corners.
attribute_architectural_style: Ottoman-inspired with fantasy elements, featuring large domes, tall minarets, and open colonnades.
